\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Manage one or more Gauss Points on Cells through the \mbox{\hyperlink{namespaceArcane}{Arcane}} Do\+Fs mechanism. 

Before using an instance of this class you need to call method \mbox{\hyperlink{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1GaussDoFsOnCells_a24c9e9f42c1cea9564dc8e81b59b9248}{initialize()}}.
